description:
Wire up the Inventory Detail page at /inventory/[id]. Currently the page route exists but has no meaningful content — it shows blank.

## Requirements

### Page (`src/app/inventory/[id]/page.tsx`)
- This should be a server component that:
  - Fetches the item data by ID using adminClient from `src/lib/supabase/server`
  - Redirects to /login if not authenticated
  - Passes the item data as props to the existing `InventoryDetail` client component
  - Adds breadcrumb: Dashboard / Inventory / {item.name}
  - Adds Suspense with skeleton loading

### The `InventoryDetail` component already exists at `src/components/inventory-detail.tsx` and is feature-rich:
- Item details header (name, category, serial number, brand, model, condition)
- Current location display with sub-location info
- Location history timeline
- QR code dialog (for printing labels)
- Check-in/checkout modal (for logging location changes)
- Linked tasks display
- Rider assignments display
- It already handles its own data fetching via the item ID

### So the page.tsx just needs to:
1. Verify auth (redirect to /login if no user)
2. Fetch the item minimal data (id, name) for the breadcrumb
3. Pass the item ID to InventoryDetail component
4. The component does the rest

### Tests
- Test page renders for authenticated user
- Test redirect to /login for unauthenticated user
- Test breadcrumb renders correctly

Read `src/components/inventory-detail.tsx` first to understand its interface — it likely accepts an itemId prop and handles its own data fetching.

log.action: Task moved to triage — filesystem validation failed
